title: euphorbia plebeia
intro: Euphorbia plebeia, also known as the 'Cathartic Spurge', is a species of succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and laxative effects. The plant's health benefits include treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as reducing fever and pain. Euphorbia plebeia is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
